html:
The Piggyback is a type of Backpack which requires 4 Pig Skins, 6 Silk, and 2 Ropes to craft and an Alchemy Engine to prototype. It is a larger Backpack which has 12 Inventory slots but reduces walking speed by 10% (20% ) while equipped. It has 4 more slots than a Backpack, but 2 less than the Krampus Sack. It cannot be placed in the inventory or in Chests. Unlike the regular backpack, it is fireproof.

Downloadable Content

In all DLCs, the Piggyback and its contents are waterproof and will not cause sanity drain while equipped. The speed penalty is also reduced from -20% to -10%.

Tips

  • This is a good replacement for the backpack until you get the Krampus Sack.
  • Using a Walking Cane, roads and other means of speed increase can mitigate or negate the speed penalty.
  • In the Hamlet DLC, the speed penalty can be mitigated with the Stalking Stick.
  • The Piggyback does not give the player any rain resistance, and using it in conjunction with an Umbrella will not protect the rest of the player's items from wetness.

Trivia

  • The Piggyback was added in the Doorway to Adventure update.
  • The Piggyback's name is a pun, on both the fact it is a backpack made from a pig's skin and on the action of giving a piggyback.

Gallery

  • Piggyback as seen in the poster for the Doorway to Adventure update.
  • Wilson wearing a Piggyback.
  • Willow wearing a Piggyback.
  • Wolfgang wearing a Piggyback.
  • Wendy wearing a Piggyback.
  • WX-78 wearing a Piggyback.
  • Wickerbottom wearing a Piggyback.
  • Woodie wearing a Piggyback.
  • Wes wearing a Piggyback.
  • Maxwell wearing a Piggyback.
  • Wigfrid wearing a Piggyback.
  • Webber wearing a Piggyback.
  • Walani wearing a Piggyback.
  • Warly wearing a Piggyback.
  • Wilbur wearing a Piggyback.
  • Woodlegs wearing a Piggyback.
  • Wilba wearing a Piggyback.
  • Wormwood wearing a Piggyback.
  • Wheeler wearing a Piggyback.
  • Winona wearing a Piggyback.
  • Wortox wearing a Piggyback.
  • Wurt wearing a Piggyback.
  • Reskined Piggyback

"piggyback"
“This little piggy's gone... "home".”
–Wilson
“I made a backpack out of butts!”
–Willow
“Smelly bag!”
–Wolfgang
“They are more useful in death.”
–Wendy
“UPGRADED STORAGE MODULE V2.0”
–WX-78
“A face only necessity could love.”
–Wickerbottom
“I used all parts of the pig.”
–Woodie
“Oh, that's just demeaning.”
–Maxwell
“An epiphany in transporting technology.”
–Wagstaff
“The pig died with hönör, then gave tö me this pack.”
–Wigfrid
“It holds so much stuff!”
–Webber
“Was it worth it?”
–Walani
“Cochon bag!”
–Warly
“From th'flesh o'th'boar.”
–Woodlegs
“'TIS SUCH AS THING WILBA MADE ON”
–Wilba
“Carries stuff”
–Wormwood
“Storage space! Just what I always wanted!”
–Wheeler
“Makes everything smell like pig.”
–Winona
“So I keep my things within this little bag made of pig skin.”
–Wortox
“Made bag from nasty pigskin.”
–Wurt
“This is giving me inspiration for a new campfire story...”
–Walter
“Do I really want to lug this thing around?”
–Wanda
The Piggyback is a type of Backpack which requires 4 Pig Skins, 6 Silk, and 2 Ropes to craft and an Alchemy Engine to prototype. It is a larger Backpack which has 12 Inventory slots but reduces walking speed by 10% (20% ) while equipped. It has 4 more slots than a Backpack, but 2 less than the Krampus Sack. It cannot be placed in the inventory or in Chests. Unlike the regular backpack, it is fireproof.
Downloadable Content[edit | edit source]
In all DLCs, the Piggyback and its contents are waterproof and will not cause sanity drain while equipped. The speed penalty is also reduced from -20% to -10%.
Tips[edit | edit source]
This is a good replacement for the backpack until you get the Krampus Sack.
Using a Walking Cane, roads and other means of speed increase can mitigate or negate the speed penalty.
In the Hamlet DLC, the speed penalty can be mitigated with the Stalking Stick.
The Piggyback does not give the player any rain resistance, and using it in conjunction with an Umbrella will not protect the rest of the player's items from wetness.
Trivia[edit | edit source]
The Piggyback was added in the Doorway to Adventure update.
The Piggyback's name is a pun, on both the fact it is a backpack made from a pig's skin and on the action of giving a piggyback.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Cõng là một loại Ba lô yêu cầu 4 Da Lợn, 6 Tơ và 2 Dây thừng để chế tạo và Máy Luyện kim để tạo nguyên mẫu. Đó là một Ba lô lớn hơn có 12 ô chứa đồ nhưng giảm tốc độ đi lại 10% (20%) khi được trang bị. Nó có nhiều hơn 4 ô so với Ba lô nhưng ít hơn 2 ô so với Túi Krampus. Nó không thể được đặt trong kho hoặc trong Rương. Không giống như ba lô thông thường, nó có khả năng chống cháy.

The speed penalty is also reduced from -20% to -10%. == {{pic|32|Prototype}}Tips == * This is a good replacement for the [[backpack]] until you get the [[Krampus Sack]]. * Using a [[Walking Cane]], roads and other means of speed increase can mitigate or negate the speed penalty. *In the ''[[Hamlet]]'' DLC, the speed penalty can be mitigated with the [[Stalking Stick]]. *The Piggyback does not give the player any rain resistance, and using it in conjunction with an [[Umbrella]] will not protect the rest of the player's items from wetness. == {{pic32|Placeholder}} Trivia == * The Piggyback was added in the ''[[Version History#March 26, 2013 - Doorway to Adventure|Doorway to Adventure]]'' update. * The Piggyback's name is a pun, on both the fact it is a backpack made from a pig's skin and on the action of giving a piggyback. =={{Pic32|Blueprint}} Gallery== Doorway to Adventure.jpg|Piggyback as seen in the poster for the ''[[Don't Starve/Version History#March 26, 2013 - Doorway to Adventure|Doorway to Adventure]]'' update.
